name.text: Calculating the area of a field shaped as an irregular polygon.

questiontext.text:
The diagram below represents a field in the shape of an irregular polygon. A baseline AD is drawn, and offsets are taken to vertices E and F.

  • Segments along baseline: AB = {#d1#} m, BC = {#d2#} m, CD = {#d3#} m
  • Perpendicular offsets: BE = {#h1#} m, CF = {#h2#} m
[[jsxgraph width="500px" height="300px"]] var board = JXG.JSXGraph.initBoard(divid, {boundingbox: [-2, 20, 30, -8], axis: false, showCopyright: false}); // Points on Baseline var A = board.create('point', [0, 0], {name: 'A', fixed: true, color: 'black'}); var B = board.create('point', [{#d1#}, 0], {name: 'B', fixed: true, color: 'black'}); var C = board.create('point', [{#d1+d2#}, 0], {name: 'C', fixed: true, color: 'black'}); var D = board.create('point', [{#d1+d2+d3#}, 0], {name: 'D', fixed: true, color: 'black'}); // Offsets var E = board.create('point', [{#d1#}, {#h1#}], {name: 'E', fixed: true, color: 'blue'}); var F = board.create('point', [{#d1+d2#}, {#h2#}], {name: 'F', fixed: true, color: 'blue'}); // Draw Polygon Boundary board.create('polygon', [A, E, F, D], {fillColor: '#ffffd1', borders: {strokeWidth: 2, strokeColor: 'black'}}); // Draw Internal Construction Lines board.create('segment', [A, D], {dash: 1, strokeColor: 'gray'}); board.create('segment', [B, E], {dash: 2, strokeColor: 'red'}); board.create('segment', [C, F], {dash: 2, strokeColor: 'red'}); // Add labels for segments board.create('text', [{#d1/2#}, -0.5, "{#d1#}m"], {anchorX: 'middle'}); board.create('text', [{#d1 + d2/2#}, -0.5, "{#d2#}m"], {anchorX: 'middle'}); board.create('text', [{#d1 + d2 + d3/2#}, -0.5, "{#d3#}m"], {anchorX: 'middle'}); [[/jsxgraph]]

Calculate the total area of the field AEFD.

Area = [[input:ans1]] m2 [[validation:ans1]][[feedback:prt1]]

generalfeedback.text:
Worked Solution

To find the total area, we divide the irregular polygon into simpler geometric shapes: two triangles and one trapezium.

  1. Area of Triangle ABE: \[ \text{Area} = \frac{1}{2} \times \text{base} \times \text{height}\] \[ = \frac{1}{2} \times {@d1@} \times {@h1@} \] \[ = {@area1@} \text{ m}^2 \]
  2. Area of Trapezium BCFE: \[ \text{Area} = \frac{1}{2}(a+b)h \] \[= \frac{1}{2} \times ({@h1@} + {@h2@}) \times {@d2@}\] \[ = {@area2@} \text{ m}^2 \]
  3. Area of Triangle CFD: \[ \text{Area} = \frac{1}{2} \times \text{base} \times \text{height} \] \[ = \frac{1}{2} \times {@d3@} \times {@h2@} \] \[= {@area3@} \text{ m}^2 \]

Total Area:

\[ \text{Total Area} = {@area1@} + {@area2@} + {@area3@}\] \[ = {@ta@} \text{ m}^2 \]

prtcorrect.text: Correct answer, well done.

prtpartiallycorrect.text: Your answer is partially correct.

prtincorrect.text: Incorrect answer.
